audit_items.proof_trace: CloneKernelInfo() can return NULL on memory allocation failures but ExpandMirrorKernelInfo() calls RotateKernelInfo() on the result without NULL checks (lines 2336-2337, 2341-2342, 2346-2347). RotateKernelInfo() immediately dereferences its kernel parameter at line 4231.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Trigger memory pressure during image morphology operations causing CloneKernelInfo() to fail and return NULL, which gets passed to RotateKernelInfo() causing a segmentation fault via null pointer dereference.
